name: Forus S.A.
summary: Forus S.A. designs, produces, imports, markets, and distributes footwear, clothing articles, and accessories in Chile, Peru, Colombia, and Uruguay. The company offers its products under the Hush Puppies, Columbia, Cat, RKF, Azaleia, Merrell, Nine West, Hush Puppies Kids, Calpany, Brooks, Mountain Hardwear, Patagonia, Sorel, Church's, Jansport, Norseg, Burton, Dakine, Pasqualini, Billabong, Element, Keds, Sperry, 7Veinte, RVCA, Body And Soul, Prana, We Love Shoes, and Vans brands. It also engages in the wholesale business. The company sells its products through 507 stores and 37 e-commerce websites. The company was formerly known as Comercial Hush Puppies Chile Limitada and changed its name to Forus S.A. in December 1991. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Las Condes, Chile. Forus S.A. is a subsidiary of Inversiones Costanera Limitada.
